case_title: JIN CHEN VS. FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. COUNSEL MICHAEL PEDHIMEY ATTEMPTED TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF FLAGSHIIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC. HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN DENIED COUNSEL'S APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. MATTER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON OPEN RECORD FOR NON APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,337.24 FILED BY CHEN, JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CORPNET, INCORPORATED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.
